llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...

actionUnits.condition: GvrAudioSource (MonoBehaviour fileID 944, guid 6dbca64e524ea44f9b26142ec59aca8a) on ButtonHoverSound has playOnAwake=false and a valid AudioClip assigned. Invoke Play to initialize and start playback, then Pause after 0.5s to test pause path.
Resume from paused state and then stop to exercise UnPause and Stop (which also calls ShutdownSource).
Validate re-initialization after Stop by starting playback again and then stopping shortly after.
